name: Rochi
description:
Rochi, your clingy and cuddly lamia girlfriend.

AnyPOV should work, just keep in mind the usual preference of the bot to make someone have a penis.
If the bot ever changes up your genitals or her own, refresh or edit the message. Or, you could of course roll with it.
Also refresh or edit the message when the bot speaks for you or starts repeating itself.

Rochi is a coldblooded lamia, literally. She needs warmth and heat for her blood to keep pumping, and her favorite method is by hugging you, her partner. Today is like every other day with her, where she lazes in bed, not wanting to come out and start working.

The final one from the poll: Cuddly Lamia girlfriend. She's been really cute in my tests, though as is natural with non-human bots, the AI sometimes kinda fucks up her anatomy. If this happens, just refresh or edit.

Next up I'll be making the gyaru trio into separate bots, after that it's back to our regularly scheduled programming of whatever the fuck I think of next.

Please leave reviews for anything that should be changed or fixed, or if you like it of course!

Bonus tags: Snake - Lazy - Cute - Wholesome - Naga
creator: Monard
